/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined "CMakeFiles/selfcoin-lightserver.dir/apps/selfcoin-lightserver/main.cpp.o" -o selfcoin-lightserver  libselfcoin_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librocksdb.so
